mapper.sql: id, user_id, currency, balance, frozen_balance, version, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_account (user_id, currency, balance, frozen_balance, version, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{currency}, #{balance}, #{frozenBalance}, #{version}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE user_account SET user_id = #{userId}, currency = #{currency}, balance = #{balance}, frozen_balance = #{frozenBalance}, version = #{version}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
